hero_title:
Building Modern
Digital Experiences
hero_subtitle: A Web Developer of high-performance interfaces and scalable systems, crafting digital products with precision, purpose, and professional elegance.
about_bio_1: With over 8 years in the digital space, my journey began at the intersection of logic and aesthetics. I don't just write code; I design systems that anticipate user needs while maintaining the rigorous standards of modern software architecture.
about_bio_2: I believe the best interfaces are invisible—they feel natural, responsive, and purposeful. My approach combines the structural power of TypeScript with the expressive fluidity of motion design.

projects.title: E-commerce App
projects.description: A high-performance luxury retail experience with seamless transitions and global state management.

projects.title: Social Media Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time engagement metrics for digital agencies with complex SVG animations.

projects.title: Neuro-Task Manager
projects.description: A minimalist productivity engine built with focus-state architecture.

projects.title: 3D Portfolio Engine
projects.description: An immersive web experience pushing the boundaries of browser-based rendering and interactive shaders.
